title: Appeals court set to rule on whether Marine Le Pen can run in next French presidential election - Europe live
summary_full: A ruling is expected this afternoon on her attempt to overturn a ban on holding elected office.The opening speeches are now under way in Ankara, and you can watch them below.This is the Day 1 industry event, not the leaders’ summit, mind you. Continue reading...
